dict.string:
Return a command suitable for copy/pasting into \(shell) on \(uname). Optimize the command for \(shell). Do NOT include commentary NOR Markdown triple-backtick code blocks as your whole response will be copied into my terminal automatically.
It must do this: \(ai.prompt)

dict.key: Only The Default BG Color Uses Transparency
dict.string: {"entries":[{"start":9211,"fontName":"UnicodeIECsymbol","count":4},{"start":9829,"fontName":"Octicons","count":1},{"start":9889,"fontName":"Octicons","count":1},{"start":11096,"fontName":"UnicodeIECsymbol","count":1},{"start":57344,"fontName":"Pomicons","count":11},{"start":57504,"fontName":"PowerlineSymbols","count":3},{"start":57507,"fontName":"PowerlineExtraSymbols","count":1},{"start":57520,"fontName":"PowerlineSymbols","count":4},{"start":57524,"fontName":"PowerlineExtraSymbols","count":21},{"start":57546,"fontName":"PowerlineExtraSymbols","count":1},{"start":57548,"fontName":"PowerlineExtraSymbols","count":8},{"start":57344,"fontName":"font-awesome-extension","count":170,"destination":57856},{"start":61440,"fontName":"Weather Icons Regular","count":236,"destination":58112},{"start":58618,"fontName":"Nerd Font File Types Regular","count":177,"destination":58874},{"start":58880,"fontName":"icomoon","count":198,"destination":59136},{"start":60000,"fontName":"codicon","count":396},{"start":61440,"fontName":"FontAwesome","count":736},{"start":62208,"fontName":"font-logos","count":48},{"start":61440,"fontName":"Octicons","count":168,"destination":62464},{"start":62076,"fontName":"Octicons","count":1,"destination":62633},{"start":61609,"fontName":"Octicons","count":86,"destination":62634},{"start":61441,"fontName":"Material Design Icons","count":2118,"destination":62720},{"start":983041,"fontName":"Material Design Icons Desktop","count":6896}],"version":1}
dict.key: Use Separate Colors for Light and Dark Mode
Only The Default BG Color Uses Transparency
Use Separate Colors for Light and Dark Mode
Animate Movement Only in Interactive Apps
Only The Default BG Color Uses Transparency
Use Separate Colors for Light and Dark Mode
